_readme: Grandfathered allow-list for client-api-coverage.test.js (Task #457). Every entry is a /api/... URL extracted from www/*.js + www/*.html that has no matching rule in www/_redirects and no entry in _dev-only-api-routes.json. Two categories: (1) 'broken' — no handler anywhere, flagged by the Task #352 audit, tracked in #455/#456; (2) 'dev-only' — handled by a www/server.js regex route that the _dev-only-api-routes.json prefix list doesn't capture. Any NEW unhandled URL added after this snapshot must either gain a www/_redirects rule, a _dev-only-api-routes.json entry, OR an explicit entry here with a reason and ticket.

urls.reason: dev-only: handled by server.js regex route, not yet ported to _redirects
